### Quick shortlist

| 2020 Toyota Highlander | WeatherTech FloorLiner HP, black, Complete Set | WeatherTech says “Guaranteed Fit For: 2020 Toyota Highlander.” Complete set covers 1st, 2nd, and 3rd rows. Part: 441609-1-2-3IM. | $318.85 |
| 2020 Toyota Highlander | WeatherTech Cargo/Trunk Liner, black | WeatherTech says “Guaranteed Fit For: 2020 Toyota Highlander.” Selected setup: Behind 2nd Row Seating. Other fit options shown: Behind 2nd Row with Bumper Protector, Behind 3rd Row, Behind 3rd Row with Bumper Protector. Note shown: designated trim required for models with optional subwoofer. | $136.95 |
| Fiat 500 | Temu 4pcs Car Hooks, Hidden Hooks for Car Headrest Seat Back | Product details say “Applicable Models: Universally Applicable,” and it’s designed for car headrest seat backs. Good cheap organizer candidate if the Fiat 500’s headrest posts can accept hooks. | Not needed |
| 2023 Honda Civic | RedLineMods “2022-2026 Xgen Civic Led Emblem” | Product page says it fits 2022-2026 Civic front grille only, so 2023 is included. Chrome or gloss black dynamic start-up styles. | Sale $189.99, regular $229.99 |
